title: scalesia helleri subsp. santacruzensis
intro: Scalesia helleri subsp. santacruzensis, also known as the Galapagos pine or the Santa Cruz pine, is a subspecies of tree that is endemic to the Galapagos Islands. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of terpenes and flavonoids in its essential oils. The health benefits of Scalesia helleri subsp. santacruzensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into essential oils, teas, or infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
